description:
Cleanup ticket — file now, do after 22.12 lands.

Several codegen-side forces and analyses were introduced to paper over the Tagged-everywhere ABI before 22.5/.6/.7. With closure_lit driving precise per-spec ABIs, audit each for residual necessity.

## Scope

For each of the below, determine: still load-bearing? pure perf opt? dead?

1. uniform_cont_reachable_specs (src/ir_codegen.rs) — gated slot-0 force on schemas/ABI when a cont was reachable from a uniform-fn (non-narrowed) path. With per-spec narrow conts, may be unreachable in the redundant sense.

2. tagged_slot0_cont_specs / cont_input_key force interactions — audit which slot-0 forces remain after .22.4 (typed cont seam) and .22.7 (typed closure body).

3. pure_forwarder analysis (src/ir_codegen.rs 22.6 commit fc1ff766) — was introduced to let fz_spawn_thunk's single-block forwarder pass through narrow reprs. With direct dispatch via closure_lit, the spawn-thunk may resolve naturally; verify whether the analysis is still load-bearing or pure opt.

4. Any tagged_return_fns seeds beyond what 22.12 dropped — what's left? Why?

## Acceptance

- cargo test --workspace green.
- Each analysis either deleted (dead), retained with a code comment citing the specific case that requires it, or marked as TODO with a follow-up ticket.
- Goal: src/ir_codegen.rs leaner; force-mechanisms reserved only for proven-required cases.

## BLOCKED BY

- fz-ul4.27.22.12 [[fz-cps-seam.force-drop]]
title: fz-cps-seam.retire-uniform-forces: audit + retire uniform_cont_reachable_specs / tagged_slot0_cont_specs / pure_forwarder
